name: Journal Your Story page renders the learning timeline or empty state
description: The Journal is a quiet, unlisted page reached directly at /app/journal (it is intentionally not in the sidebar). A logged-in user who opens it sees the 'Your Story' heading and the subtitle about every explanation written and concept mastered, followed by EITHER a chronological timeline of learning milestone entries with dates, OR a gentle empty state ('Your story is just beginning.') for a new account. A 404 or blank page is not acceptable.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the page renders the 'Your Story' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) with the subtitle referencing the explanations written and concepts mastered

Verify the body renders exactly one of the two valid states: EITHER a chronological timeline of milestone entries each showing a formatted date and a sentence, OR the gentle empty-state message 'Your story is just beginning.' -- rather than an empty or broken container
